# Bearing

> Find the right AI model for your task

Bearing is an open, transparent AI model recommendation tool. Users describe what they want to do, set their priorities across 7 factors, and get a ranked shortlist of AI models with full scoring transparency.

## What Bearing does

- Recommends AI models based on task description, complexity, and user priorities
- Scores 29 models across 7 factors: quality, capability, cost, speed, privacy, sustainability, transparency
- Lets users compare any two models head-to-head by sending the same prompt
- Provides pipeline recommendations for multi-stage tasks
- Suggests local inference options for open-weight models
- Publishes all comparison outcome data openly

## Scoring factors

- Quality: task fitness based on benchmarks and capabilities
- Capability: features like vision, code generation, tool use, long context
- Cost: estimated per-task cost based on pricing
- Speed: inference latency
- Privacy: data handling and retention policies
- Sustainability: energy use, infrastructure, environmental footprint
- Transparency: open weights, training data disclosure, methodology openness

## Models covered

29 models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Meta, DeepSeek, Mistral, Alibaba (Qwen), xAI, MiniMax, Moonshot AI, IBM, and GreenPT.

## Links

- Main app: https://findbearing.org
- Documentation: https://docs.findbearing.org
- Model ratings research: https://docs.findbearing.org/model-ratings/
- User guide: https://docs.findbearing.org/user-guide/
- Source code: https://github.com/dataforaction-tom/bearing

## Built by

The Good Ship (https://good-ship.co.uk) — data for action.
